prerequisites: A MailerSend account with a sending domain added to your account.
A MailerSend API token (provided in the api_token field), generated for the domain you want to read from.
The domain ID of the MailerSend sending domain you want to pull data for (the domain_id config field).

authMethods.name: API token (Bearer)
authMethods.summary: MailerSend authenticates with an API token sent as a Bearer token in the HTTP Authorization header (Authorization: Bearer <api_token>). Provide this value in the connector's api_token field. Tokens are generated per sending domain and can be scoped with read or full permissions per area of the account.

setupSteps.title: Generate a MailerSend API token
setupSteps.body: In the MailerSend dashboard, go to Integrations, find MailerSend API and click Manage, then click Create new token. In the pop-up, set a name, select the domain the token applies to, optionally set an expiration date, and choose Full access or Custom access permissions. Click Create token and copy the token value. If you do not set an expiration date, the token defaults to expiring in 24 hours, so set an explicit expiration for an ongoing sync.

setupSteps.title: Find your domain ID
setupSteps.body: Identify the ID of the MailerSend sending domain you want to read from. This is the same domain you selected when creating the API token. You will provide it in the connector's domain_id field.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the API token in the api_token field and the domain identifier in the domain_id field. Both are required. Optionally set start_date to limit how far back the connector pulls historical data. The connector calls the MailerSend API at https://api.mailersend.com/v1/, sending the token as Authorization: Bearer <api_token>.

setupSteps.title: Be aware of rate limits
setupSteps.body: MailerSend enforces a default limit of 60 requests per minute on general API endpoints. Exceeding a limit returns HTTP 429 with a retry-after header indicating how long to wait. Daily request quotas also apply and vary by account plan.

sources.title: MailerSend General API resources (authentication and rate limits)
